chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No. D – 321 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case (Letter issued) 03.07.2018 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the applicants. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Deputy Prosecutor General for the State..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the applicants, on the instructions, doesn’t press this Cr. Misc. Application and states that the alleged detainee has already been recovered. In view of the above, this Cr. Misc. Application is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
